description: Recto: Document in Arabic script. Verso: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Only the upper right corner is preserved, containing a few words from the opening and a sizeable text block from the right margin. Mentions 2 months... al-rayyis... a house. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
